$comment: The devices[].port field is typed as integer. Workers that connect over serial (not TCP) would not fit this shape. Since all current workers connect via TCP/Modbus TCP/MQTT over IP. Note for future: if a serial-connected worker is added, port may need to become optional or an alternative address scheme added.
title: MDK Device-Lib Contract Schema
description: Formal JSON Schema defining the unified programmatic and semantic capabilities contract for MDK device integration workers.

metadata.description: Identity and family metadata defining what the worker represents.

provider.description: The corporate or individual provider behind the worker (e.g., 'microbt').

brand.description: The human-readable brand name of the device.

modelsSupported.description: List of specific models this specific contract supports.

overview.description: Mandatory semantic overview. Used to instruct AI agents on the broad purpose and critical environmental constraints for this device group.

devices.description: Lists specific physical hardware devices this worker manages dynamically.

capabilities.description: The unified machine and semantic capabilities mapping for the device.

telemetry.description: Metrics continuously updated and read from the device. Natural semantic rules should be appended to the 'description' field.

description.description: Human and AI readable metric description. Should include semantic boundaries (e.g., 'If 0, device is booting').

constraints.description: Strict semantic limits (e.g., 'Do not call more than once every 15 minutes').

examples.description: Concrete AI instruction workflows for how to utilize this command optimally.

intent.description: The goal or overarching reason for executing the workflow.

steps.description: Step-by-step numbered execution plan for the AI.

params.description: Input arguments required by the command.

schema.description: Reference identifier for config payload shape.

troubleshooting.description: Semantic AI reasoning array. Provides if-then remediation workflows for specific failures.

errors.description: Lookup table mapping specific device error codes to human/AI-readable text.
